zh.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton是Margery De Cotton的女兒，於1369年出生在英國英格蘭爾。她於1391年與Randal MAINWARING在英國英格蘭爾金德頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1459年在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton是Margery De Cotton的女儿，于1369年出生在英国英格兰爾。她于1391年与Randal MAINWARING在英国英格兰爾金德頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1459年在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton was born in 1369, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Margery De Cotton. She married Randal MAINWARING in 1391, in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1459, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton est née en 1369, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Margery De Cotton. Elle a épousé Randal MAINWARING en 1391, à Kinderton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1459, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton wurde 1369 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Margery De Cotton geboren. Sie hat 1391 in Kinderton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Randal MAINWARING geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1459 im Alter von 90 Jahren in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kindertonは1369年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでMargery De Cottonの娘として生まれた。1391年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアキンデルトンでRandal MAINWARINGと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1459年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton(은)는 1369년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Margery De Cotton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1391년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 킨더턴에서 Randal MAINWARING(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 프오버에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton nasceu em 1369, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Margery De Cotton. Ela casou-se com Randal MAINWARING em 1391, em Kinderton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Margery Venables Lady of Kinderton родилась в 1369 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Её мать звали Margery De Cotton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randal MAINWARING в 1391 г. в местности киндиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1459 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет.
